prestazioni: Engine: C25XE 2.5L 24V V6 (170 PS stock) – Full forged internals with Mahle Motorsport pistons (86.0mm bore, 10.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Upgraded to a custom Schrick 272° camshaft profile with titanium retainers and dual valve springs from Supertech.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by TurboSmart, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a GReddy Type-R intercooler (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core). Fuel system upgraded to Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability.

Suspension & Handling: KW Variant 3 coilovers (8-position adjustable damping, 30mm drop) with custom-valved Öhlins TTX40 dampers for track use. Polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (full subframe and control arm refresh), Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm), and Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Body Kit: Custom widebody conversion using a modified Irmscher Evo II kit (extended fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with carbon fiber front splitter and rear wing from Seibon Carbon. Full respray in Opel Arctic White (original code 283) with matte black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower cladding.

Wheels & Tires: BBS LM-R 9x17 ET35 (front) and 10x17 ET25 (rear) in gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear). Custom center caps with Opel Motorsport logo and titanium wheel bolts from H&R.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, custom roll cage by Safety Devices (MOT Type-approved, bolt-in design). Dashboard and door cards retrimmed in Alcantara with red stitching, Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada with GPS lap timer and data logging.
